languages.text: "Во имя Бога-Императора и Человечества, Ваша Светлость. Мы принесем пламя Его ярости на Зарков".
"In the name of the God-Emperor and Humanity, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We will bring the flames of His fury down upon Zarkov."
languages.original_text: "Во имя Бога-Императора и Человечества, Ваша Светлость. Мы принесем пламя Его ярости на Зарков".

traits.locale_text: "In the name of the God-Emperor and Humanity, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We will bring the flames of His fury down upon Zarkov."
"In the name of the God-Emperor and Humanity, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We will bring the flames of His fury down upon Zarkov."
"In the name of the God-Emperor and Humanity, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We will bring the flames of His fury down upon Zarkov."

languages.text: 「神皇帝と人類の名において、貴{mf|卿|女卿}。我々は彼の怒りの炎をザルコフに落とすであろう」
languages.original_text: "In the name of the God-Emperor and Humanity, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We will bring the flames of His fury down upon Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: 「神皇帝と人類の名において、貴{mf|卿|女卿}。我々は彼の怒りの炎をザルコフに落とすであろう。」

languages.text: «En nombre del Dios Emperador y la Humanidad, mi{mf|lord|lady}, arrojaremos las llamas de Su furia sobre Zarkov».
languages.original_text: "In the name of the God-Emperor and Humanity, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We will bring the flames of His fury down upon Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: «En nombre del Dios Emperador y la Humanidad, mi{mf|lord|lady}, arrojaremos las llamas de Su furia sobre Zarkov».

languages.text: “以神皇与人类之名，大人，我们将让祂的怒火洒满扎尔科夫的大地。”
languages.original_text: "In the name of the God-Emperor and Humanity, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We will bring the flames of His fury down upon Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: “以神皇与人类之名，大人，我们将让祂的怒火洒满扎尔科夫的大地。”

languages.text: "Im Namen des Gottimperators und der Menschheit, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Wir werden die Flammen Seines Zorns über Zarkov bringen."
languages.original_text: "In the name of the God-Emperor and Humanity, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We will bring the flames of His fury down upon Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: "Im Namen des Gottimperators und der Menschheit, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Wir werden die Flammen Seines Zorns über Zarkov bringen."

languages.text: "Tanrı İmparator ve İnsanlık adına {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. O'nun gazabının alevlerini Zarkov'da harlayacağız."
languages.original_text: "In the name of the God-Emperor and Humanity, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We will bring the flames of His fury down upon Zarkov."

traits.locale_text: "Tanrı İmparator ve İnsanlık adına {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. O'nun gazabının alevlerini Zarkov'da harlayacağız."

languages.text: « Au nom de l'Empereur-Dieu et de l'humanité, Votre Seigneurie, nous ferons s'abattre les flammes de Sa fureur sur Zarkov. »
languages.original_text: "In the name of the God-Emperor and Humanity, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. We will bring the flames of His fury down upon Zarkov."
